subject: Refund for last month's Pro charge
body: Hi, my last monthly charge on May 1 was for $29 but I've decided to switch tools. I'd like a refund please — I haven't used the platform much this billing cycle.

subject: Refund our Enterprise annual fee
body: We've moved to a different platform and need a refund for the rest of our Enterprise annual subscription. Renewed Jan 10 2026.

subject: Add a second admin to our Business workspace
body: I'm the owner of our Business plan workspace and I want to add my co-founder as an admin. Is there a limit on Business?

subject: Is there a free tier?
body: I'm on the Free plan — what features does it include and what would I gain from upgrading to Pro?

subject: Refund question
body: I want to understand how refunds work for monthly Pro plans. Can you walk me through the rules?

subject: Refund timing
body: How quickly do refunds get processed once they're approved? I've been waiting.
